top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 7 AND Date = '2013-04-01') - 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 5 AND Date = '2013-04-01') AS ConsumptionDifference

SELECT 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 7 AND Date = '2013-04') - 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 5 AND Date = '2013-04') AS consumption_difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 7 AND Date = '2013-04-01') - 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 5 AND Date = '2013-04-01') AS ConsumptionDifference

SELECT 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 7 AND Date = '2013-04') - 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 5 AND Date = '2013-04') AS consumption_difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 7 AND Date = '2013-04-01') - 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 5 AND Date = '2013-04-01') AS ConsumptionDifference

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN CustomerID = 7 THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN CustomerID = 5 THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_difference
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID IN (7, 5) AND Date = '2013-04'

SELECT 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 7 AND Date = '2013-04') - 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 5 AND Date = '2013-04') AS consumption_difference

final.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 7 AND Date = '2013-04-01') - 
    (SELECT Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 5 AND Date = '2013-04-01') AS ConsumptionDifference
